title: stachys sintenisii
intro: Stachys sintenisii, also known as alpine betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of alpine betony include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Herbal preparations of Stachys sintenisii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil.
